description: Current security boundary posture. Sourced from v2.5.1 and v2.9.1 release records.
provenance: Security boundary evidence derived from release manifest and v2.5.1/v2.9.1 release records.

relay_auth.description: Token generation and verification via Cloudflare Worker

content_security_policy.description: Tauri CSP with no unsafe-eval, no wildcards

patch_checksum.description: Before and after checksums for all patches

credential_storage.description: GitHub PATs stored in platform credential provider, never plaintext

master_secret.description: Never in desktop client, never in dashboard client
master_secret.v2_9_1_fix: Removed former hardcoded admin-token literal from public dashboard

dashboard_authority.description: Dashboard is not the authority plane. Desktop remains the governed control plane.
